task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Oscar EMR using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Oscar EMR main dashboard, schedule screen, or navigation menu indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent searched for and located the patient Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a patient search result, demographic record, or billing list explicitly displaying the name 'Maria Santos'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the specific rejected billing claim from yesterday.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a billing claim details screen or edit form for Maria Santos with a Service Date corresponding to yesterday.

task_completion.description: Verify the diagnosis code was changed to 250.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the diagnosis code input field in the billing form showing '250' (it should have been changed from '999').

task_completion.description: Verify the claim status was changed to 'Bill'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the status dropdown, radio button, or field in the billing form set to 'Bill' or 'B' (it should have been changed from an Error/Rejected state).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved or submitted the updated claim.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a click on a 'Save', 'Update', or 'Submit' button, a success confirmation message, or a return to the billing list showing the claim for Maria Santos with the updated 'Bill' status and '250' diagnosis.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oscar EMR web interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Oscar EMR UI. There should be no terminal windows running SQL commands or direct database updates.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually interacted with the billing form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for visual cues of form interaction, such as dropdown menus being expanded, text being typed into input fields, or cursor focus on the diagnosis and status fields.

integrity.description: Verify the results appear in the genuine Oscar EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL should match the expected Oscar EMR local address, and the page styling/layout should be consistent with the application, rather than a locally mocked HTML file or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Maria Santos. Target Diagnosis Code: 250 (Diabetes mellitus). Target Status: 'B' (Bill). Login credentials: username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', PIN '1117'. The original diagnosis code was '999' and the original status was 'E' (Error).
